title: A Resolution approving and adopting the Los Baños GAD Focal Point System - Executive Committee (GFPS - EXECOM) Resolution No. 2025-01 dated August 27, 2025 entitled: "Resolution Realigning Several Appropriations under the Gender and Development (GAD) Fund for FY 2025 amounting to Two Million Nine Hundred Thousand Pesos and 00/100 (Php 2,900,000.00) and thereafter Allocating and Approving the Same for Various Purposes".
